name: Cod Fish Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the salt cod fish overnight.
2. In the morning, pour off the water and rinse the fish with fresh water.
3. Add the potatoes to a pot of boiling water and cook until tender.
4. Mash the boiled potatoes and mix in the egg and chopped onion.
5. Mix in the soaked and rinsed salt cod fish, adjusting saltiness as needed.
6. Form the mixture into patties or cakes.
7. Fry the cakes in oil until golden brown on all sides.
8. Turn off the heat when finished cooking.
